task_description: Finalize Docker and push complete codebase to GitHub repository
handoff_notes: QA full-stack integration approved. All backend and frontend tests passing. System fully functional. Ready for DevOps to containerize (if needed) and push all code to target GitHub repo. Ensure branch 'feature/secure-blog-api' is created and pushed. Include all source files, Dockerfiles, docker-compose, GitHub Actions, and deployment guide.
feedback_notes:
PROJECT COMPLETION SUMMARY:

All stages successfully completed:
- Product-Manager: PRD defined
- System-Architect: DB schema + API contracts
- Backend-Dev: Spring Boot JWT API
- PKI-Specialist: Security audit passed
- QA-Agent: Backend tests + full-stack integration APPROVED
- Frontend-Dev: React dashboard with Tailwind + Redux

ARTIFACTS READY:
- Backend: src/main/java, pom.xml, application.properties, README, tests
- Frontend: React app with Tailwind, Redux, all pages, tests
- Docker & CI/CD: Dockerfile, docker-compose, GitHub Actions workflow
- Docs: DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md, QA_FULLSTACK_REPORT.md

SECURITY:
- JWT with env-managed secret
- BCrypt password hashing
- Ownership enforcement
- No hardcoded secrets

QUALITY:
- Backend coverage ~87%
- Frontend coverage ~80%
- All acceptance criteria met

READY FOR GITHUB PUSH. Create branch 'feature/secure-blog-api' and push all files. Optionally open PR to main.
